description: Event handler for changing actor stance. Stances affect movement, cover usage, and skill availability. Connected to the suppression system - suppression triggers automatic stance changes.

1.name: Crouching/Suppressed
1.description: Crouching stance. Set automatically when actor becomes suppressed (suppression state 1). Provides better cover usage.

2.name: Prone/PinnedDown
2.description: Prone/lying down stance. Set automatically when actor becomes pinned down (suppression state 2). Maximum cover, severely restricted actions.

fields_analyzed.name: TargetStance
fields_analyzed.description: The stance to apply when this effect is used. Values: 0=Standing, 1=Crouching, 2=Prone.
fields_analyzed.evidence: OnUse reads from effect+0x58 and passes to Actor.SetStance

fields_analyzed.name: RequiresCurrentStance
fields_analyzed.description: If true, the skill is only visible/usable when actor is in a specific stance.
fields_analyzed.evidence: IsHidden and IsUsable check effect+0x5C as condition before comparing stances

fields_analyzed.name: RequiredStance
fields_analyzed.description: The stance required for this skill to be visible/usable (when RequiresCurrentStance is true).

fields_analyzed.name: CurrentStance
fields_analyzed.description: The actor's current stance (0=Standing, 1=Crouching, 2=Prone). Updated by SetStance.
fields_analyzed.evidence: SetStance writes to param_1+0xD0, IsHidden reads from Actor+0xD0

fields_analyzed.name: Suppression
fields_analyzed.description: Current suppression value. Determines suppression state which auto-sets stance.
fields_analyzed.evidence: SetSuppression writes to Actor+0x15C, GetSuppressionState reads it

fields_analyzed.name: UnknownFlag
fields_analyzed.description: Flag cleared when stance becomes 0 (standing). Purpose unclear, possibly related to suppression recovery.
fields_analyzed.evidence: SetStance clears Actor+0x16F when stance param is 0

fields_analyzed.name: EffectData
fields_analyzed.description: Reference to the ChangeStance effect data containing TargetStance and other configuration.
fields_analyzed.evidence: Create stores effect reference at handler+0x18

fields_analyzed.name: SoundWhenSuppressed
fields_analyzed.description: Sound played when actor enters suppressed state (state 1).
fields_analyzed.evidence: OnSuppressionStateChanged plays Stem_ID at effect+0x58 when param_3==1

fields_analyzed.name: SoundWhenPinnedDown
fields_analyzed.description: Sound played when actor enters pinned down state (state 2).
fields_analyzed.evidence: OnSuppressionStateChanged plays Stem_ID at effect+0x60 when param_3==2

fields_analyzed.name: PinnedDownSkill
fields_analyzed.description: Skill added when pinned down (state 2), removed when recovering from pinned down.
fields_analyzed.evidence: OnSuppressionStateChanged adds/removes skill at effect+0x68 based on state

fields_analyzed.name: RequiredStance (FilterByStance)
fields_analyzed.description: Stance required for skills with this filter to be enabled/visible.
fields_analyzed.evidence: FilterByStanceHandler::IsEnabled compares Actor stance with effect+0x58

fields_analyzed.name: UsableWhenPinnedDown
fields_analyzed.description: Flag indicating skill can be used when pinned down (stance 2). Checked to determine if turn ends.

key_discoveries.description: Stance is tightly coupled with suppression. SuppressionHandler automatically sets stance to 1 (Crouching) when suppressed and 2 (Prone) when pinned down. The suppression state is calculated from a float value with thresholds at DAT_182d8fe40 and DAT_182d8fe48.
When an actor becomes pinned down (state 2), their AP is set to 0 and turn may end unless they have a skill with UsableWhenPinnedDown flag. This is checked via HasUsableActiveSkillForPinnedDown.
Becoming suppressed (state 1) reduces AP by 30 (0x1E). This is a one-time penalty applied in OnSuppressionStateChanged.
Stance changes trigger ElementAnimator.OnStanceChanged which updates animator int parameter and notifies HeavyWeaponComp. Animation changes can be immediate or delayed with random timing.
Vehicles (EntityTemplate type 4) have special stance change handling - all elements get OnStanceChanged called individually when suppression state changes.
FilterByStanceHandler allows skills to be conditionally enabled/hidden based on current stance. This enables stance-specific abilities (e.g., prone-only skills).
Tutorial uses SetStance(actor, 0, 1) to force standing stance with immediate animation update, demonstrating the force flag parameter.

suppression_thresholds.note: These are constant addresses - actual values require runtime inspection

methods_documented.name: Actor::SetStance
methods_documented.signature: void SetStance(Actor* this, int stance, bool forceUpdate)
methods_documented.behavior: Updates Actor.CurrentStance at offset 0xD0. Iterates through all Elements calling OnStanceChanged. Clears flag at 0x16F when stance becomes 0.

methods_documented.name: ChangeStanceHandler::OnUse
methods_documented.behavior: Reads TargetStance from effect data (offset 0x58) and calls Actor.SetStance to apply it.

methods_documented.name: ChangeStanceHandler::IsHidden
methods_documented.behavior: Returns true if actor is null, or if RequiresCurrentStance is set and actor's stance doesn't match RequiredStance.

methods_documented.name: ChangeStanceHandler::IsUsable
methods_documented.behavior: Similar to IsHidden. Checks if stance change is valid based on RequiresCurrentStance and RequiredStance.

methods_documented.name: SuppressionHandler::OnSuppressionStateChanged
methods_documented.signature: void OnSuppressionStateChanged(Handler* this, Actor* actor, int newState, int oldState)
methods_documented.behavior: Handles state transitions. State 1: plays suppressed sound, reduces AP by 30, sets stance to 1. State 2: plays pinned sound, adds PinnedDownSkill, sets stance to 2, drains all AP, may end turn.
